name: meraki-integration
description: Cisco Meraki Dashboard API via MCP. Manage organizations, networks, devices, clients, wireless SSIDs, switch ports, and event logs.

api_key.title: Meraki API Key
api_key.description: Your Meraki Dashboard API key. Find it in Meraki Dashboard → Account → API access.

api_url.title: API URL
api_url.description: Meraki API base URL. Leave default unless using a regional endpoint (e.g. https://api.eu.meraki.com/api/v1).

tools.name: meraki_get_organization_inventory
tools.description: Get device inventory for an organization

tools.name: meraki_get_organization_uplinks_status
tools.description: Get WAN uplink status for all MX appliances

tools.name: meraki_list_networks
tools.description: List all networks in an organization

tools.name: meraki_get_network_clients
tools.description: List clients connected to a network

tools.name: meraki_get_network_alerts
tools.description: Get alert settings for a network

tools.name: meraki_get_network_events
tools.description: Get event log for a network

tools.name: meraki_get_device_uplink
tools.description: Get uplink settings for an MX appliance

tools.name: meraki_list_ssids
tools.description: List wireless SSIDs for a network

tools.name: meraki_list_switch_ports
tools.description: List all ports on a switch

tools.name: meraki_get_switch_port_statuses
tools.description: Get live port statuses on a switch
